headline: Corpay (CPAY) Is Up 5.6% After Embedding Stablecoin Wallets And Expanding Capital Return Plans
summary: Earlier in May 2026, Corpay, Inc. announced a partnership with stablecoin platform BVNK to embed stablecoin wallets and settlement alongside fiat balances for its more than 800,000 clients, while also updating investors on substantial progress under its long-running US$8.90 billion share repurchase program and expanded credit facilities. The move to integrate stablecoin rails into both customer payments and Corpay’s own treasury operations highlights how the company is broadening its role in...

headline: Here's Why You Should Retain Corpay Stock in Your Portfolio Now
summary: CPAY shares jump 10.9% over the past month as Corporate Payments growth, acquisitions and cross-border activity boost momentum.
